torch_pattern: y = torch.matmul(x, weight); y = y + bias if bias is not None else y; y = activation_fn(y) if fused_activation else y; out = torch.addcmul(addcmul_residual, y, addcmul_gate, value=scalar)
weight_transform: weight kept as-is in [K, N] layout (torch nn.Linear weight must be transposed to [in_features, out_features]); bias passed as separate bias_tensor
applicability_notes: constraints: ['addcmul_residual and addcmul_gate must be broadcast-compatible with matmul output shape [M, N_out]', 'M, K, N_out derived from padded_shape; matmul program config built from device compute grid']

placement_observations.program_config: get_matmul_config(M, K, N_out, core_grid) where core_grid = mesh_device.compute_with_storage_grid_size()
placement_observations.source: call_site: to_out projection in DiT attention block
call_site: fuse_addcmul branch after all_gather, with optional fused_activation and bias
